title: Bus Touring - Norway - Karosjock to Alta & Down The Fjord. 8-2010. 1/2

transcript.text: The central pedestrian area of Alta, Norway. There's a statue
Of a Sammy worker. It's real. Whoever made that was good
Doing some kind of metal work
Hills with no trees on them. We're way north right on the coastline
The city and it's surrounded by mountains
Somebody said there's a 700 mile mountain bike race here, too
In the summertime when the sun never goes down
It never got dark last night
Okay, bus stopped. All right, where's that snow? Check it out. We still got snow. The snow never went away
And Alta snow-capped peaks in the beginning of August
And like that's just probably like a thousand feet up and snow-capped peaks
On that mountain. That's the snow over there
Farther up north that way that's that's north-capped the northernmost part of like
